SEARCH
Package simpaths.model.taxes

Class KeyFunction4

java.lang.Object
simpaths.model.taxes.KeyFunction4
All Implemented Interfaces:
IKeyFunction
public class KeyFunction4 extends Object implements IKeyFunction
CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS

  • Method Details

    • evaluateKeys

      public Integer[] evaluateKeys(int simYear, int priceYear, int age, int numberMembersOver17, int numberChildrenUnder5, int numberChildren5To9, int numberChildren10To17, double hoursWorkedPerWeekMan, double hoursWorkedPerWeekWoman, int dlltsdMan, int dlltsdWoman, int careProvision, double originalIncomePerWeek, double secondIncomePerWeek, double childcareCostPerWeek)
      METHOD TO EVALUATE DONOR KEYS FOR COARSE EXACT MATCHING
      Specified by:
      evaluateKeys in interface IKeyFunction
      Parameters:
      simYear - simulated year
      priceYear - year of prices used to measure financial statistics
      age - simulated age
      numberMembersOver17 - family members aged 18+
      numberChildrenUnder5 - family members under age 5
      numberChildren5To9 - family members aged 5 to 9
      numberChildren10To17 - family members aged 10 to 17
      hoursWorkedPerWeekMan - employment hours per week of adult male
      hoursWorkedPerWeekWoman - employment hours per week of adult female
      dlltsdMan - disability status of man
      dlltsdWoman - disability status of woman
      careProvision - indicator that at least one member of household provides social care
      originalIncomePerWeek - original income per week of family (possibly negative)
      Returns:
      Integer list of keys, ordered from most fine (0) to most coarse (2)

    • getMatchFeatureIndex

      public int getMatchFeatureIndex(MatchFeature feature, int taxDBRegime, int keyValue)
      Specified by:
      getMatchFeatureIndex in interface IKeyFunction

    • isLowIncome

      public boolean[] isLowIncome(Integer[] keys)
      METHOD TO INDICATE IF TAX UNIT IS MEMBER OF 'LOW INCOME' CATEGORY FOR DATABASE MATCHING
      Specified by:
      isLowIncome in interface IKeyFunction

    • getTaxdbCounter

      public Map<MatchFeature,Map<Integer,Integer>> getTaxdbCounter()
      WORKER METHOD TO CALL OR INITIALISE THE COUNTER MAPPING FOR DONOR KEYS
      Specified by:
      getTaxdbCounter in interface IKeyFunction
      Returns:
      taxdbCounter populated as implied by current matching function
